mapper.select: SELECT cs.* FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY cs.created_at DESC
SELECT cs.* FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY cs.created_at DESC
SELECT cs.* FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = #{courseId} AND cs.student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM course_student WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.* FROM user u INNER JOIN course_student cs ON u.id = cs.student_id WHERE cs.course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
